sources.name: roboflow_hurgor_yapayzeka_gorev1_local
sources.notes: Local Roboflow export added 2026-07-12. Merges buldozer/car into arac, drops goal/kale direği, and converts polygon labels to bounding boxes during normalization.

sources.name: eflatun_teknofest_2022
sources.notes: Landing repository for the TEKNOFEST 2022 AI in Transportation winners dataset. README links to a 46 GB Google Drive dataset.zip, so the actual YOLO archive requires a larger disk before download.

sources.name: eflatun_teknofest_2022_drive_archive
sources.notes: Vehicle/Pedestrian aerial YOLO archive. Do not download onto the current 33 GB free disk; use an external disk or free at least 55-60 GB.

sources.name: roboflow_hepsi_aaa
sources.notes: Public Roboflow Universe project with insan/tasit/uai/uap classes; requires ROBOFLOW_API_KEY for export download.

sources.name: roboflow_teknofest_2023_uap_uai
sources.notes: Public Roboflow Universe UAP/UAI project; class variants such as UAİ-, UAP- are merged to uai/uap.

sources.name: roboflow_dronecekimi_ders
sources.notes: Small public Roboflow Universe project with insan/tasit/uai/uap classes; export may require creating a version first.

sources.name: hf_uap_uai_yolo12x_best
sources.notes: Two-class UAP/UAI checkpoint for auto-labeling or comparison, not a final four-class detector.
